generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data including swing angle and wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of the crane for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling cart movement along the gantry"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling hoisting motion"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for container pickup"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program connecting to crane controllers for data transmission"
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database containerized for scalable data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Mosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for interactive monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python C4 Containers module for integrated system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System operation optimization service for crane control"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data preservation and analysis service for historical crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAnalysisInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time system state monitoring service for crane visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensuring digital model accuracy against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyValidationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for crane operations"
]

instance HistoricalDataAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical crane data for performance evaluation"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane system state"
]

instance ModelAccuracyValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of digital model accuracy against physical system behavior"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory research environment for lab-scale gantry crane"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architectural visualization with a context diagram (Figure 2) and container diagram. The digital twin consists of six containers, modeling the system's components for the lab-scale gantry crane."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics, and compares the value against an acceptable threshold."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "An MQTT Broker facilitates signaling between services including the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer (on-premise), with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. All software runs on the host machine, and the physical crane is connected directly to this computer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes AutomationML for digital twin modeling, with Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline implementation. Other exemplars adopt ad-hoc approaches without specific standards compliance."
]
